landing.heroLead: Tonight's bedtime story stars your little
landing.heroSubtitle: Upload photos from today. Storywink writes and illustrates a picture book about your child: their name, their people, their real adventure. Then watch their face when they turn the page and it's them.
landing.ctaMicrocopy: Free to make and read · usually ready in about 15 minutes · no card needed
landing.morphCaption: a real photo → a real Storywink book
landing.morphCaptionFallback: a real book, page by page
landing.proofSub: Three real books, made from real family photos. Tap a cover and flip through every page.
landing.likenessLine: Will it actually look like your kid? The pictures come from your photos, so they keep their hair, their smile, that jacket they refuse to take off. Open a book above and judge for yourself.
landing.howItWorksAlt: How Storywink works: upload your photos, add the personal touches, we bring it to life, a book they'll treasure
landing.step2Caption: Their name, your art style, and the little details that make it theirs
landing.step3Caption: Written and illustrated for them — usually ready in about 15 minutes
landing.step4Caption: Read together, save the PDF, or order a printed copy
landing.hiwReassurance: You can leave while it works. We'll have it ready.
landing.keepsakeTitle: One story, three ways to keep it
landing.keepsakeSub: Every book is free to make and read. Print it only if you love it.
landing.keepsakeCard1Body: Read it together in the app, on the phone already in your hand at bedtime.
landing.keepsakeCard2Body: Download the keepsake PDF (about 4MB) and send it to the grandparents. It travels well.
landing.keepsakeCard3Body: Order a real printed copy: 8.5″ square, full-colour, bound like the picture books on their shelf. You only pay if you print.
landing.keepsakeCard3SoonBody: A real printed copy — 8.5″ square, full-colour, bound like the picture books on their shelf — is coming to your region soon.
landing.keepsakeShipping: Printing ships to Singapore & Malaysia today. More countries soon.
landing.safetyLine: Your photos are used only to make your child's book. Never sold, never shared.
landing.faq1Q: How does Storywink.ai create personalized storybooks?
landing.faq1A: Upload a few photos from a day out, tell us your child's name, and pick an art style — you can add little details about the photos too. Storywink writes a short story about that day, then illustrates every page with your child as the hero.
landing.faq2Q: What age group is Storywink.ai designed for?
landing.faq2A: Our storybooks are perfect for toddlers and young children aged 2-8 years old. The stories are crafted with age-appropriate language and themes that engage young minds.
landing.faq3Q: How long does it take to create a storybook?
landing.faq3A: Your book is usually ready within about 15 minutes of starting. The story comes first and the pictures follow — you can watch the progress, and we'll let you know the moment it's done.
landing.faq4A: Yes — tell us what happened in the photos, pick the art style, and edit any page's words whenever you like.
landing.faq5Q: Is my child's data and photos safe?
landing.faq5A: We take your family's privacy seriously. Your photos are used only to make your book — they're processed by trusted AI partners (OpenAI and Google) that write and illustrate it, and stored securely with Cloudinary. We never sell your data, and we'll delete your photos whenever you ask.
landing.faq6Q: Can I print the book or keep a copy?
landing.faq6A: Both. Every finished book can be saved as a beautiful PDF to keep, and you can order a professionally printed copy from your library. Printed books currently ship to Singapore and Malaysia, with more countries on the way.

create.createFailedHint: Your photos are safe — give it another go.

create.photosLeftBehind: {count, plural, one {1 photo was} other {# photos were}} still uploading, so we went ahead without {count, plural, one {it} other {them}}. You can add more on the next screen.
create.tipVariety: Mix different moments — places, faces, little details.
create.tipArc: A beginning, a middle, and an end give the story its shape.
create.tipSkipDupes: Skip near-duplicates — one photo per moment is plenty.
create.pathPhotosChip: Quickest — great after a real outing
create.pathFriendsChip: Best for making up stories together
